examples: Smell Vinous, red fruit, violet flower.
Reduced, vinous nose hints at pungent wild red fruits, minerals, smoked meat and tobacco.
Body - That quality in a wine which gives it the appearance of consistency and vinous strength.
It would be like risking the vinous equivalent of the bends, the decompression sickness of deep-sea divers who ascend too quickly from the bottom of the ocean.
It's more vinous entertainment than vinous enlightenment.
